steps.title: Count each type of side
steps.content: There are $n$ sides with length 4 cm. The number of 9 cm sides is $6n$, and the number of 5 cm sides is $7$.

steps.title: Add the side counts
steps.content:
The polygon has 42 sides total, so the counts must add to 42:
$$n+6n+7=42$$

choiceElimination:
• Choice A — $6n+7=42$: This omits the n sides with length 4 cm from the count. It only counts the 6n sides of 9 cm and the 7 sides of 5 cm, missing the n sides themselves. ✗
  • Choice B — $7n+7=42$: Counts 6n (9 cm sides) + n (4 cm sides) + 7 (5 cm sides) = 7n + 7 = 42. All three groups are included and combined correctly. ✓
  • Choice C — $9n+4n+5n=42$: Multiplies the lengths (9, 4, 5) by n and adds them. This mixes lengths with counts and does not equal the total number of sides. ✗
  • Choice D — $9 \left(6n\right)+4n+5 \left(7\right)=42$: Multiplies lengths by counts (e.g., 9 cm × 6n sides), which gives total centimeters, not total sides. This equals 42 cm, not 42 sides. ✗
That matches Choice B — $7n+7=42$.
